title: Workshop Blueprint Market
concept: A visual Blueprint marketplace for educators where the first screen is a dense image-rich catalog with a command/search overlay, while PR starts, GitHub import, ZIP import, save destinations, saved management, and Site Manager tools remain adjacent and consequence-aware.
focus: image-rich Blueprint marketplace as the first usable screen
command/search overlay with route-specific launch forms
educator workshop flow proof for launch, save, progress, and result
browser save versus local directory save distinction
Site Manager coverage without making the first screen a generic operations console
flows: Search and filter a represented 43-entry Blueprint catalog, select a Blueprint card, inspect runtime and steps, then run or inspect its JSON.
Switch between Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and Import .zip with each route showing its real inputs and consequences.
Save a temporary Playground either in browser storage or to a local directory with separate destination selection, progress text, and resulting saved state.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with visible temporary-state warning, saved identity, rename, delete consequence, Homepage, WP Admin, and path navigation.

Use Site Manager surfaces for settings reset or stored reload, file browsing and editing, Blueprint copy/download/run, database tools, logs, export to GitHub, download zip, and import zip over the current site.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
